mapper.sql: id, task_title, task_type, elderly_id, elderly_name, description, address, contact_phone, scheduled_date, scheduled_time, priority, status, volunteer_id, volunteer_name, claimed_time, completed_time, completion_note, rating, feedback, created_by, demand_id, created_time, updated_time, latitude, longitude
mapper.select: SELECT t.*, COALESCE(e.photo_url, ei.photo_url) as elderly_photo_url, v.avatar as volunteer_avatar, d.id as d_id, d.title as d_title, d.attachment_url as d_attachment_url, d.description as d_description, d.contact_person as d_contact_person, d.intended_volunteer_id as d_intended_volunteer_id, dv.id as dv_id, dv.user_id as dv_user_id, dv_u.full_name as dv_full_name, dv_u.phone as dv_phone, dv.skills as dv_skills FROM task_info t LEFT JOIN elderly_info e ON t.elderly_id = e.id LEFT JOIN demand d ON t.demand_id = d.id LEFT JOIN elderly_info ei ON d.target_id = ei.id LEFT JOIN sys_user v ON t.volunteer_id = v.id LEFT JOIN volunteer_profile dv ON d.intended_volunteer_id = dv.id LEFT JOIN sys_user dv_u ON dv.user_id = dv_u.id WHERE t.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task_info ( task_title, task_type, elderly_id, elderly_name, demand_id, description, address, contact_phone, scheduled_date, scheduled_time, priority, status, created_by, volunteer_id, volunteer_name, claimed_time, created_time ) VALUES ( #{taskTitle}, #{taskType}, #{elderlyId}, #{elderlyName}, #{demandId}, #{description}, #{address}, #{contactPhone}, #{scheduledDate}, #{scheduledTime}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{volunteerId}, #{volunteerName}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE task_info SET task_title = #{taskTitle}, task_type = #{taskType}, elderly_id = #{elderlyId}, elderly_name = #{elderlyName}, description = #{description}, address = #{address}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, scheduled_date = #{scheduledDate}, scheduled_time = #{scheduledTime}, priority = #{priority} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE task_info SET volunteer_id = #{volunteerId}, volunteer_name = #{volunteerName}, status = 'CLAIMED', claimed_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task_info WHERE volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} AND status IN ('CLAIMED', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'COMPLETED', 'APPROVED')
SELECT task_type AS type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM task_info GROUP BY task_type
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(rating), 0) FROM task_info WHERE rating IS NOT NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE task_info SET volunteer_id = NULL, volunteer_name = NULL, status = 'PENDING', claimed_time = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('CLAIMED', 'IN_PROGRESS')
